abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: "BOOM! Headshot!"
abilities.text: While resolving attack actions, if this model flips (not cheats) a 13, it may treat the 13 as the red joker.

abilities.name: Expert Climber
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may ignore vertical distance while resolving the Walk or Charge action.

actions.name: Clockwork Shove
actions.effects: The target gains a Staggered token. Move the target up to 3", +2" for each raise this action receives.

actions.name: Clockwork Seeker
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This attack has a raise value of 3.

triggers.name: Ensouled Bullet
triggers.text: Summon an Abomination with health equal to the damage suffered from this action into base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Trigger Happy
triggers.text: Once per activation. Declare this action again, targeting a different model.

triggers.name: "I Meant to Do That!"
triggers.text: After failing, the next action this model declares this activation receives +2 Skl.

triggers.name: Severe Injury
triggers.text: When resolving, if the target has an Injured token, deal +1 damage to it. Otherwise, it gains an Injured token.

actions.name: Scrounge
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Target a marker.
actions.effects: Place this model in base contact with the target, then remove the target.

triggers.name: "Sweet! A Compression Coil!"
triggers.text: Draw a card and this model heals 1.
